case_title: DE LORENZO, NICHOLAS L. VS DIVISADERO TOUCHLESS CAR WASH et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $801.42 FILED BY DE LORENZO,  NICHOLAS L. AS TO DEFENDANT DIVISADERO TOUCHLESS CAR WASH CANADIAN-AMERICAN OIL CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LORENZO,  NICHOLAS L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIVISADERO TOUCHLESS CAR WASH CANADIAN-AMERICAN OIL CO. $801.42 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $851.42 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

APPEAL DISMISSED, ABANDONED BY APPELLANT PER JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN.
THE TOTAL AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY DUE PLAINTIFF IS $1000.42.
